productDisplayName: Femella Women Olive Green Spaghetti Top
description: Style NoteA basic top to pep up your training sessions or to layer under a tee, this black top from femella has a unique style quotient while the soft blended fabric will keep you in exemplary comfort all day. Wear it with form fitting denims and style with understated accessories and peep-toe shoes.Product DetailsOlive green spaghetti strap top, has adjustable straps and a straight necklineMaterial and CareBlended spandex and elastaneWash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringDry inside outUse warm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRelaxed fitThe model (height 5'8 and chest 33") is wearing a size M
